ddls:
CREATE TABLE "netflow_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NetFlow record */,
  "netflow_version" TEXT /* Version of the NetFlow protocol used */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used (e.g., tcp, udp) */,
  "src_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address */,
  "src_port" INTEGER /* Source port number */,
  "dst_ip" TEXT /* Destination IP address */,
  "dst_port" INTEGER /* Destination port number */,
  "in_bytes" INTEGER /* Number of bytes transferred in the flow */,
  "in_packets" INTEGER /* Number of packets transferred in the flow */,
  "flow_start_ms" TEXT /* Start time of the flow in milliseconds since epoch */,
  "flow_end_ms" TEXT /* End time of the flow in milliseconds since epoch */,
  "tcp_flags" TEXT /* TCP flags used in the flow */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of the engine generating the NetFlow data */,
  "engine_id" TEXT /* ID of the engine generating the NetFlow data */,
  "icmp_type" INTEGER /* ICMP type, if applicable */,
  "icmp_code" INTEGER /* ICMP code, if applicable */,
  "fwd_status" TEXT /* Forwarding status of the flow */,
  "fwd_reason" TEXT /* Forwarding reason of the flow */,
  "src_tos" TEXT /* Type of service (TOS) value of the source */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network device generating the NetFlow data */,
  "flow_duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the flow in seconds */,
  "byte_rate" REAL /* Rate of bytes transferred per second */,
  "packet_rate" REAL /* Rate of packets transferred per second */,
  "application_protocol" TEXT /* Application protocol (e.g., HTTP, FTP) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the source IP address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the source IP address */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the source IP address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the source IP address */,
  "asn" INTEGER /* Autonomous System Number of the source IP address */,
  "isp" TEXT /* Internet Service Provider of the source IP address */,
  "threat_level" TEXT /* Threat level of the flow (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "anomaly_score" REAL /* Anomaly score of the flow, indicating how unusual the traffic is */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_netflow_records_dst_ip FOREIGN KEY ("dst_ip") REFERENCES ip_addresses ("ip_address"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_netflow_records_protocol FOREIGN KEY ("protocol") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_netflow_records_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_netflow_records_src_ip FOREIGN KEY ("src_ip") REFERENCES ip_addresses ("ip_address")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the network device */,
  "device_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the network device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the network device (e.g., router, switch) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the network device */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the device */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the network device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the network device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the network device */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the device was last updated */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the network device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol (e.g., tcp, udp) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "port_range" TEXT /* Common port range for the protocol */,
  "security_risk" TEXT /* Security risk associated with the protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_addresses" (
  "ip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP address */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address (e.g., 192.168.1.1) */,
  "ip_type" TEXT /* Type of IP address (e.g., source, destination) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the IP address */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain name associated with the IP address */,
  "is_internal" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the IP address is internal to the network */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Date when the IP address was last seen in the network */,
  "threat_score" INTEGER /* Threat score of the IP address based on threat intelligence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for emergency contacts */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NetFlow record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the record was accessed */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES netflow_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NetFlow record associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., high traffic, suspicious activity) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* User assigned to handle the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the alert was resolved */,
  "threat_intelligence_source" TEXT /* Source of the threat intelligence that triggered the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES netflow_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "report_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the report (e.g., last 24 hours, last week) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL to access the report */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)
